nodes.name: Resolve Intake Context
nodes.notes: Uses only incoming IDs. Does not invent UUIDs or create placeholder users/workspaces.

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ JSON.stringify({ runtime_message_type: $json.message_type, input_flags: $json.input_flags, attachments_summary: $json.attachments_summary, links: $json.links, raw_payload_summary: $json.metadata?.raw_payload_summary, original_channel: $json.channel }) }}

nodes.name: Prepare Intake Output Without DB
nodes.notes: Returns controlled failed intake output without any Supabase query/write when required DB context is missing or invalid.

nodes.name: Prepare SW-00A Input
nodes.notes: Maps intake output into the approved SW-00A input contract.

nodes.name: Execute SW-00A Input Normalizer Agent
nodes.notes: Calls approved sub-workflow. No OpenAI node is embedded in this workflow.

nodes.name: Prepare SW-00B Input
nodes.notes: Maps SW-00A result into SW-00B input contract.

nodes.name: Execute SW-00B Intent Router Agent
nodes.notes: Calls approved sub-workflow. No routing AI is embedded in this workflow.

nodes.name: Prepare SW-00C Input
nodes.notes: Runs only when router says needs_prompt_request = true.

nodes.name: Execute SW-00C Brief Decision Extractor Agent
nodes.notes: Calls approved sub-workflow only when router says needs_prompt_request = true. No database rows are created here.

nodes.name: Skip Brief Extractor
nodes.notes: Skips SW-00C when no prompt_request is needed.

nodes.name: Prepare SW-00D Input
nodes.notes: Builds response composer input from normalized, routed, and optional brief decision results.

nodes.name: Prepare Failed SW-00D Input
nodes.notes: Builds response composer input for failed intake without calling SW-00A/B/C.

nodes.name: Build Assistant Response Context
nodes.notes: Combines SW-00D output with intake and agent results before optional assistant message save.

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ JSON.stringify({ response_type: $json.composer_result.response_type, should_continue_pipeline: $json.composer_result.should_continue_pipeline, should_ask_user: $json.composer_result.should_ask_user, question_to_user: $json.composer_result.question_to_user, sw00a_result: $json.normalizer_result, sw00b_result: $json.router_result, sw00c_result: $json.brief_decision_result }) }}

nodes.name: Save Assistant Message
nodes.notes: Only the assistant response is inserted in this stage.

nodes.name: Build WF-00 Response
nodes.notes: Builds the final approved WF-00 response contract.

parameters.jsCode:
const allowedKeys = [
  'wf_status',
  'conversation_session_id',
  'user_message_id',
  'assistant_message_id',
  'message_to_user',
  'response_type',
  'should_continue_pipeline',
  'should_ask_user',
  'question_to_user',
  'intake',
  'normalizer_result',
  'router_result',
  'brief_decision_result',
  'errors'
];
const out = {};
for (const key of allowedKeys) out[key] = $json[key];
return [{ json: out }];

nodes.name: Return WF-00 Response
nodes.notes: Returns only the approved final WF-00 response contract.

nodes.name: Normalize Incoming Payload
nodes.notes: Normalizes webhook/chat payload into one internal shape. No AI.

parameters.name: title
parameters.value: ={{ $json.title || 'AI Creative Generation Model & Platform Research Report' }}

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.value: ={{ {   purpose: 'AI Creative Direction OS model registry and prompt adaptation knowledge base',   source_quality: 'web_researched',   uploaded_via: 'n8n_form_trigger',   intended_usage: [     'model routing',     'prompt adaptation',     'platform rules',     'image model prompting',     'video model prompting',     'reference support rules',     'negative prompt support rules',     'workflow knowledge retrieval'   ],   intended_tables: [     'ai_generation_models',     'model_prompt_adaptation_rules',     'platform_rules',     'creative_knowledge_blocks',     'prompt_writing_rules',     'prompt_validation_rules',     'repair_strategies'   ] } }}

nodes.name: HTTP Request
nodes.notes: Authorization and apikey now use n8n environment variables: SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY. Configure them in n8n before running this node.

parameters.formDescription: Upload a research markdown/text file to ingest into AI Creative Direction OS.

main.node: Execute SW-00C Brief Decision Extractor Agent
